task.capture_order: block b uses class order rotated left by b modulo 3
task.session_vote: plurality over four windows; lowest class id breaks a tie

window.selection: first 128 rows; four contiguous non-overlapping windows

validation.normalization: training-fold min/max affine map to 0..30000, round-half-even, held-out clamp with diagnostics
validation.session_leakage_policy: all four windows from one session remain in one fold

safety.target: separate low-voltage actuator or fan; never an FPGA rail
safety.supply: current-limited bench supply with limit at or below the actuator continuous-current rating
abort_conditions: operator cannot confirm the actuator current rating

models.threshold: training-fitted scalar normal-versus-anomaly threshold with deterministic tie breaks
models.som: seven-node SPU_SOM_MAP_V1 with the published deterministic v1 schedule
models.ambiguity: the v1 hardware flag means exact zero winner/runner-up gap; report all gaps and exact ties

gates.failure_policy: Record a negative result; do not tune the frozen capture, feature, fold, model, or gate contract against held-out scores.
